parts: Spilhaus planned an experimental city near Swatara, Minnesota with the help of this fellow futurist, who partnered with Shoji Sadao to design the Montreal Biosphère. In a Futurama episode titled in part for this place, Fry accidentally becomes his own grandfather after the untimely death of his original grandfather Enos. [10] Spilhaus's experiments with weather balloons as part of Project Mogul probably led to the UFO rumors surrounding this New Mexico site.

Spilhaus was appointed by John F. Kennedy to direct the United States exhibit at this event, a visit to which was depicted in the MST3K-featured short Century 21 Calling. [10] Kennedy bowed out of appearing at this event, for which the Space Needle was constructed, due to the ongoing Cuban Missile Crisis.

answers: R. Buckminster Fuller [or Richard Buckminster Fuller; or Bucky Fuller]
the 1962 World's Fair [or the Seattle World's Fair; prompt on Century 21 Exposition or partial answers]

answers: the Alhambra [or al-Hamra or Calat Alhamra; accept Tales of the Alhambra (by Washington Irving)]
